name: creepwave-forge
description: Run Creepwave Forge step-by-step orchestration from Codex using local MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Run role-based Forge workflows step by step
interface.longDescription: Creepwave Forge adds local tools for running role-based task orchestration from Codex. It routes prompts through one active skill at a time, validates runtime step output and handoff contracts, and can use the Tracking-reforged project context by default.
defaultPrompt: Run Forge for this Tracking-reforged task
